stem: A musician uses a computer to record music by sampling analogue sound.
model_answer: The amplitude of the wave is measured at set intervals.

parts.label: (a)
parts.prompt: Tick the one box that correctly describes sound sampling.

options: The frequency of the wave is measured a set number of times each second.
The amplitude of the wave is measured at set intervals.
The digital sound wave is measured a set number of times each second.
The analogue sound wave's resolution is measured at set intervals.

mark_points.text: The amplitude of the wave is measured at set intervals.
